meta.title: Govern The Ungovernable - NIST CSF Govern Function
meta.description:
The NIST added a sixth function to the previous cybersecurity framework functions: Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond and Recover ... Govern.

What does it mean? What does it require? If you have a NIST CSF what do you need to do to evaluate and incorporate Govern requirements?

Alan outlines several basic concepts which can be incorporated into existing processes and activities which enable organizations to ease into formalized structures of governance without the large overhead many fear when hearing the term. By demonstrating the additional value and benefit of tweaking existing engineering practices, cybersecurity professionals can obtain the buy-in needed from organizational stakeholders to bolster their defense and address organizational risks.
